{{Quote|Okay, meet Maghr Scutu in the Atrium. He will give you directions on how to deliver the package.|[[Tarand Crowe]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:S" />}}
'''Maghr Scutu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aquala/Legends|Aquala]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] criminal who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I need somone to smuggle out a plant. This plant is used to make a rare spice.|Maghr Scutu, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:S" />}}
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Maghr Scutu visited [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], in order to obtain a a rare plant that grew in the station's atrium. He thus contacted the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Tarand Crowe]] in order to obtain a portion of this plant that could be used to make [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. Crowe accepted but he was not able to perform the job himself since he was watched by the authorities of the station. He instead recruited a spacer who agreed with serving as an intermediate. The spacer therefore met Maghr Scutu who provided information about the delivery and then managed to steal a portion of the plant undetected. The spacer later launched into space in his own [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], traveled to a rendezvous point in the Bright Jewel system and delivered the plant to another ship piloted by one of Scutu's henchman.<ref name="SWG:S" />

==Behind the scenes==
Maghr Scutu appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:S" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Maghr Scutu was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:S" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
